# FF Network

> Career transition tracker for former federal employees moving into tech. Track contacts, companies, follow-ups, and momentum.

FF Network prioritizes revenue-generating tech roles (Sales, Business Development, Customer Success) for people leaving federal government. The app provides contact and company tracking, follow-up reminders, AI-assisted outreach drafting, and a pitch builder.

## Pages

- [Home](/): App entry point — redirects to dashboard for signed-in users.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free and Pro plan details, Stripe checkout for Pro.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Account creation and login.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of public routes.
- [Robots](/robots.txt): Crawler directives.
